mapper.select: SELECT id as id, dealerId as dealerId, (select dealerName from dealer where id = dealerId) as dealerName, activityTypeId as activityTypeId, (select activityType from activity_config where id = activityTypeId) as activityType, activityTime as activityTime, applyFee as applyFee, writeOffStatus as writeOffStatus, activityContent as activityContent FROM activity_info LIMIT #{start}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_info (dealerId, activityTypeId, activityTime, applyFee, writeOffStatus, activityContent) VALUES (#{dealerId}, #{activityTypeId}, #{activityTime}, #{applyFee}, #{writeOffStatus}, #{activityContent})
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_info SET dealerId=#{dealerId}, activityTypeId=#{activityTypeId}, activityTime=#{activityTime}, applyFee=#{applyFee}, writeOffStatus=#{writeOffStatus}, activityContent=#{activityContent} WHERE id = #{id}
